resources.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
resources.description: AWS certifications for cloud architecture, development, operations, AI, and machine learning.

resources.name: Google Cloud
resources.description: Google Cloud certifications for cloud engineering, architecture, development, DevOps, and machine learning.

resources.name: Linux Foundation
resources.description: Linux, Kubernetes, and cloud infrastructure certifications including LFCS, LFCE, CKA, CKAD, and CKS.

resources.name: Microsoft Azure
resources.description: Cloud and AI certifications including AZ-900, AZ-104, AZ-204, AZ-305, AZ-400, AI-900, and AI-102.

resources.name: Red Hat
resources.description: Enterprise Linux and cloud platform certifications including RHCSA, RHCE, and RHCA.

resources.name: Centri
resources.description: Defensive cybersecurity certifications including BTL1, BTL2, CSOM, and CJDE.

resources.name: Cisco
resources.description: Networking and cybersecurity certifications including CCNA, CyberOps Associate, and CCNP Security.

resources.name: CompTIA
resources.description: Industry-standard cybersecurity certifications including Security+, CySA+, PenTest+, and SecurityX.

resources.name: INE
resources.description: Practical cybersecurity certifications including eJPT, eCPPT, eWPT, and eMAPT.

resources.name: ISC2
resources.description: Globally recognized cybersecurity certifications including CC, SSCP, CISSP, and CCSP.

resources.name: OffSec
resources.description: Highly respected hands-on offensive security certifications including OSCP, OSEP, OSWE, and OSED.

resources.name: TCM Security
resources.description: Hands-on penetration testing certifications including PNPT and PJPT.
